lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਜਾਤਿ ਤੂ ਵਰਨਾ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tudh roop na rekhiaa jaat too varanaa baaharaa |
lines.english: You have no form or shape, no social class or race.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਾਣਸ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਤੂ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਜਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: e maanas jaaneh door too varateh jaaharaa |
lines.english: These humans believe that You are far away; but You are quite obviously apparent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਨੰਦੀ ਅਨੰਤ ਸਭ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too purakh anandee anant sabh jot samaaharaa |
lines.english: You are the blissful and infinite Primal Lord God; Your Light is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਭੋਗਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਲਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too sabh ghatt bhogeh aap tudh lep na laaharaa |
lines.english: You enjoy Yourself in every heart, and no filth sticks to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮੇਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਕੁਲ ਤਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis meleh satigur aap tis ke sabh kul taraa |
lines.english: One whom You Yourself unite with the True Guru - all his generations are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭ ਦੇਵਾ ਮਹਿ ਦੇਵ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ਨਰਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too sabh devaa meh dev bidhaate naraharaa |
lines.english: Among all divine beings, You are the most divine, O Creator-architect, Rejuvenator of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਇਕ ਤੂ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਪਰਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa aaraadhe jihavaa ik too abinaasee aparaparaa |
lines.english: How can my single tongue worship and adore You? You are the eternal, imperishable, infinite Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਦੇ ਸੇਵ ਦਰਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sevak sabh karade sev dar naanak jan teraa |5|
lines.english: All Your servants serve You; Nanak is a humble servant at Your Door. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਡੜੜਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਣਿ ਛਾਇਆ ਗਾਫਲ ਜਲਿਓਹੁ ਭਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gahaddarrarraa trin chhaaeaa gaafal jaliohu bhaeh |
lines.english: He builds a hut of straw, and the fool lights a fire in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਹੜੈ ਤਿਨ ਉਸਤਾਦ ਪਨਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa bhaag mathaaharrai tin usataad panaeh |1|
lines.english: Only those who have such pre-ordained destiny on their foreheads, find Shelter with the Master. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੀਠਾ ਪਕਾ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਧਰਿਆ ਆਣਿ ਮਉਜੂਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak peetthaa pakaa saajiaa dhariaa aan maujood |
lines.english: O Nanak, he grinds the corn, cooks it and places it before himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਬੈਠਾ ਝਾਕੁ ਦਰੂਦ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: baajhahu satigur aapane baitthaa jhaak darood |2|
lines.english: But without his True Guru, he sits and waits for his food to be blessed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਨਾਇਆ ਰਜਿ ਰਜਿ ਸੇਈ ਖਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jinee guroo manaaeaa raj raj seee khaeh |3|
lines.english: Those who obey their Guru, eat and are totally satisfied. ||3||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭੁਸਰੀਆ ਪਕਾਈਆ ਪਾਈਆ ਥਾਲੈ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bhusareea pakaaeea paaeea thaalai maeh |
lines.english: O Nanak, the loaves of bread are baked and placed on the plate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh jag meh khel rachaaeaa vich haumai paaeea |
lines.english: You have staged this play in the world, and infused egotism into all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਪੰਚ ਚੋਰ ਹਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek mandar panch chor heh nit kareh buriaaeea |
lines.english: In the one temple of the body are the five thieves, who continually misbehave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਨਾਰੀ ਇਕੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਦਸੇ ਸਾਦਿ ਲੋੁਭਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: das naaree ik purakh kar dase saad loubhaaeea |
lines.english: The ten brides, the sensory organs were created, and the one husband, the self; the ten are engrossed in flavors and tastes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਮੋਹੀਆ ਨਿਤ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਭਰਮਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: en maaeaa mohanee moheea nit fireh bharamaaeea |
lines.english: This Maya fascinates and entices them; they wander continually in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਅਗੈ ਸਕਤੀ ਹਾਰਿਆ ਏਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: siv agai sakatee haariaa evai har bhaaeea |
lines.english: Matter loses out to spirit; this is pleasing to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਠਾ ਦੋਵੈ ਕੀਤੀਓ ਸਿਵ ਸਕਤਿ ਵਰਤਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: haatthaa dovai keeteeo siv sakat varataaeea |
lines.english: You created both sides, spirit and matter, Shiva and Shakti.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਜੋ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik vichahu hee tudh rakhiaa jo satasang milaaeea |
lines.english: You enshrined spirit within, which leads to merger with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਬਿੰਬੁ ਉਠਾਲਿਓ ਜਲ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਈਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jal vichahu binb utthaalio jal maeh samaaeea |6|
lines.english: Within the bubble, You formed the bubble, which shall once again merge into the water. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗਾਹਾ ਕੂ ਤ੍ਰਾਘਿ ਪਿਛਾ ਫੇਰਿ ਨ ਮੁਹਡੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: aagaahaa koo traagh pichhaa fer na muhaddarraa |
lines.english: Look ahead; don't turn your face backwards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਝਿ ਇਵੇਹਾ ਵਾਰ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਜਨਮੜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sijh ivehaa vaar bahurr na hovee janamarraa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, be successful this time, and you shall not be reincarnated again. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣੁ ਮੈਡਾ ਚਾਈਆ ਹਭ ਕਹੀ ਦਾ ਮਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: sajan maiddaa chaaeea habh kahee daa mit |
lines.english: My joyful friend is called the friend of all.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਠਾਹੇ ਚਿਤੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: habhe jaanan aapanaa kahee na tthaahe chit |2|
lines.english: All think of Him as their own; He never breaks anyone's heart. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਝੜਾ ਲਧਮੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਮਥੈ ਹੀ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gujharraa ladham laal mathai hee paragatt thiaa |
lines.english: The hidden jewel has been found; it has appeared on my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਥਾਨੁ ਜਿਥੈ ਪਿਰੀਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀ ਤੂ ਵੁਠਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: soee suhaavaa thaan jithai piree naanak jee too vutthiaa |3|
lines.english: Beautiful and exalted is that place, O Nanak, where You dwell, O my Dear Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂ ਮੇਰੈ ਵਲਿ ਹੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹਛੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa too merai val hai taa kiaa muhachhandaa |
lines.english: When You are on my side, Lord, what do I need to worry about?

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖਮੀ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਖਾਇ ਖਰਚਿ ਰਹੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: lakhamee tott na aavee khaae kharach rahandaa |
lines.english: My wealth is inexhaustible, no matter how much I spend and consume.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੈਨੋ ਸਉਪਿਆ ਜਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਬੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: tudh sabh kichh maino saupiaa jaa teraa bandaa |
lines.english: You entrusted everything to me, when I became Your slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਵੈਰੀ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਭਿ ਕੀਤਿਆ ਨਹ ਮੰਗਹਿ ਮੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: eeh vairee mitr sabh keetiaa neh mangeh mandaa |
lines.english: All these enemies have become my friends, and no one wishes me ill.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਸਭ ਸੇਵ ਕਰੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh medanee sabh sev karandaa |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings all work to serve me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪੁਛਈ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਬਖਸੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa koe na puchhee jaa har bakhasandaa |
lines.english: No one calls me to account, since God is my forgiver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੰਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: anand bheaa sukh paaeaa mil gur govindaa |
lines.english: I have become blissful, and I have found peace, meeting with the Guru, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰਿਐ ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੰਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabhe kaaj savaariai jaa tudh bhaavandaa |7|
lines.english: All my affairs have been resolved, since You are pleased with me. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਦਾ ਕਿਤੈ ਹਾਲਿ ਜਾ ਡਿਠਮੁ ਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਧ੍ਰਾਪਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: firadaa kitai haal jaa ddittham taa man dhraapiaa |1|
lines.english: I wandered around in such a miserable state, but when I saw You, my mind was comforted and consoled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੇਖਣ ਕੂ ਮੁਸਤਾਕੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਕਿਜੇਹਾ ਤਉ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: ddekhan koo musataak mukh kijehaa tau dhanee |
lines.english: I am so eager to see You, O Lord; what does Your face look like?

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:
